page.title: Stance Register And Evaluation
page.subtitle_html: Stance Register And Evaluation - C2 cautious claims, evaluative language, and precise academic register.
page.subtitle_text: C2 cautious claims, evaluative language, and precise academic register.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Stance, register and evaluation: compact C2 anchors for positioning claims without sounding over-certain or informal.","rules":[{"label":"Hedged stance","text":"Use it could be argued that, it is possible that, and appears to when evidence needs careful framing.","example":"It could be argued that the results remain inconclusive."},{"label":"Evaluative precision","text":"Choose evaluative adjectives and nouns that match the strength of the evidence.","example":"The proposal represents a significant but limited improvement."},{"label":"Register control","text":"Prefer formal, balanced phrasing in academic or professional contexts.","example":"The evidence suggests a cautious interpretation of the trend."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the English Sentence Builder C2 lesson on stance, register and evaluation.
